name: python3-more-termcolor
title: python3-more-termcolor
summary: Pass unlimited number of colors, color-codes, or attributes (Python 3)
description:
Pass unlimited number of colors, color-codes, or attributes (Python 3)
This package contains a library to pass unlimited number of colors,
color-codes, or attributes. Intelligently handles existing colors in the text
as to allow adding or combining colors automatically, while ensuring the
smallest string size possible
.
This package installs the library for Python 3.
